userrights-groups-help:
Ye mey alter the groups that {{GENDER:$1|this uiser}} is in:
* A checked box means the uiser is in that group.
* An unchecked box means the uiser isna in that group.
* A * indicates that ye canna remuiv the group ance ye hae eikit it, or vice versa.
* A # indicates that ye can anely pit back the expiration time o this group membership; ye canna bring it forrit.
userrights-no-interwiki: Ye dinna hae permission tae eedit uiser richts oan ither wikis.
userrights-nodatabase: Database $1 disna exeest or isna local.
userrights-expiry-options: 1 day:1 day,1 week:1 week,1 month:1 month,3 months:3 months,6 months:6 months,1 year:1 year
userrights-invalid-expiry: The expiry time for group "$1" is invalid.
userrights-expiry-in-past: The expiry time for group "$1" is in the past.
userrights-conflict: Conflict o uiser richts chynges! Please luikower n confirm yer chynges.
right-autocreateaccount: Automatically log in wi an freemit uiser accoont
right-suppressredirect: Nae mak reguidals fae soorce pages whan flittin pages
right-reupload-own: Owerwrite exeestin files uplaidit bi yersel
right-reupload-shared: Owerride files oan the shaired media repositerie locallie
right-purge: Purge the steid cache fer ae page
right-autoconfirmed: Na be affectit bi IP-based rate leemits
right-bot: Be treatit aes aen autæmatit process
right-nominornewtalk: Na hae smaa eedits til discussion pages trigger the new messages prompt
right-apihighlimits: Uise heicher leemits in API queries
right-deletelogentry: Delete an undelete speceefic log entries
right-deleterevision: Delete an undelete speceefic revisions o pages
right-deletedhistory: See deletit history entries, wioot thair associatit tex
right-deletedtext: See deletit tex an chynges atween deletit revisions
right-suppressrevision: See, hide an unhide speceefic revisions o pages fae ony uiser
right-viewsuppressed: See revisions scuggit fae ony uiser
right-block: Block or unblock ither uisers fae editin
right-blockemail: Block or unblock ae uiser fae sendin wab-mail
right-hideuser: Block or unblock ae uisername, hidin or unhidin it fae the public
right-ipblock-exempt: Bypass IP blocks, autae-blocks  range blocks
right-protect: Chynge fendin settins an edit cascade-fendit pages
right-editcontentmodel: Eedit the content model o ae page
right-editmyusercss: Eidit yer ain uiser CSS files
right-editmyuserjson: Eedit yer ain uiser JSON files
right-editmyuserjs: Eedit yer ain uiser JavaScript files
right-editmywatchlist: Eedit yer ain watchleet. Mynd that some actions will still eik pages even wioot this richt.
right-viewmyprivateinfo: See yer ain preevate data (e.g. wab-mail address, real name)
right-editmyprivateinfo: Eedit yer ain preevate data (e.g. wab-mail address, real name)
right-rollback: Quicklie rowback the eedits o the laist uiser that eeditit ae parteecular page
right-markbotedits: Maurk rowed-back eedits aes bot eedits
right-noratelimit: No be affected bi rate limits
right-importupload: Import pages fae ae file uplaid
right-autopatrol: Hae ye'r ain eedits autaematiclie maurked aes patrowed
right-unwatchedpages: See ae leet o onwatched pages
right-userrights-interwiki: Eedit the uiser richts o uisers oan ither wikis
right-override-export-depth: Export pages incluidin linked pages up til ae depth o 5
right-changetags: Add an remuive arbitrar [[Special:Tags|tags]] on individual reveesions an log entries
grant-delete: Delete pages, reveesions, an log entries
grant-editinterface: Eedit the MediaWiki namespace an uiser CSS/JavaScript
action-autocreateaccount: automatically creaut this freemit uiser accoont
action-history: see the history o this page
action-move-subpages: mui this page, n its subpages
action-reupload-shared: owerride this file oan ae shaired reposeeterie
action-upload_by_url: uplaid this file fae ae URL
action-protect: chynge protection levels fer this page
action-rollback: quicklie rowback the eedits o the laist uiser that eeditit ae parteecular page
action-importupload: import pages fae ae file uplaid
action-autopatrol: hae yer eedit maurked aes patrowed
action-unwatchedpages: see the leet o onwatched pages
action-mergehistory: merge the history o this page
action-userrights-interwiki: eedit the uiser richts o uisers oan ither wikis
action-editcontentmodel: eedit the content model o ae page
action-applychangetags: applee tags alang wi yer cheenges
action-changetags: add an remuive arbitrar tags on individual reveesions an log entries
action-suppressredirect: nae mak reguidals fae soorce pages whan flittin pages
listgrouprights-summary:
The follaein is ae leet o uiser groops defined on this wiki, wi thair associatit access richts.
There micht be [[{{MediaWiki:Listgrouprights-helppage}}|additional information]] anent individual richts.
listgrouprights-addgroup-self-all: Eik aw groops til yer accoont
listgrouprights-removegroup-self-all: Remuiv aw groops fae yer accoont
listgrouprights-namespaceprotection-rest: Richt(s) allooing ae uiser tae eedit
